source: QiVerse T03/T04 focused glyph model. Guang remains manually tuned; Fu, Chong, Jian, Ta, and Ji are converted from Photoshop pen path exports.

work.title: Zhao Mengfu Guangfu Chongjian Ta Ji - QiVerse
work.description: Uses the original scroll particle field as background and overlays focused glyph skeleton/ribbon data in the Return local-appreciation view.
